title: koeleria cristata var. convoluta
intro: Koeleria cristata var. convoluta, also known as the tufted hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. convoluta include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds, or internally to support digestive health and immune function.
